---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible bug or unexpected behaviour
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened.

## Screenshots / logs

If applicable, paste relevant console output or attach screenshots.

## Environment

| Field                  | Value                      |
| ---------------------- | -------------------------- |
| OS                     | e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14  |
| Whisper Studio version | e.g. 0.1.0                 |
| Python version         | e.g. 3.11.4                |
| openai-whisper version | e.g. 20231117              |
| GPU / compute mode     | e.g. CPU / NVIDIA RTX 3080 |

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here.
